results.title: Roles for IBA-derived auxin in plant development.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 28992091. 2018/01/04 00:00. BACKGROUND: We designed and synthesized a novel bisphosphonate 
radiopharmaceutical (68 Ga- or 177Lu-labeled DOTA-ibandronate 
[68 Ga/177Lu-DOTA-IBA]) for the targeted diagnosis and treatment of bone 
metastases. The biodistribution and internal dosimetry of a single therapeutic 
dose of 177Lu-DOTA-IBA were evaluated using a series of single-photon emission 
computerized tomography (SPECT) images and blood samples. Five patients with 
multiple bone metastas
